svg.title: AI Recruiting Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the full AI recruiting pipeline from JD ingestion through parallel processing, ranking, critique loop, and outreach drafting.

g.text: Fast screener · Groq llama-3.1-8b (JD Parser, Resume Screener)
Analysis workers · Groq llama-3.3-70b (Bias Checker, Team Gap)
Independent critic · Gemini 2.5 Flash (different model family)
